summary: Phase 3 Leads Page Redesign Testing Complete - Comprehensive testing of new property grouping, unassigned leads section, and new lead fields. All major functionality working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Unit availability date validation blocking past tenant creation in test
minor_bugs.impact: Test-only issue, not affecting production functionality

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 422 for missing fields before validating property_id existence
minor_bugs.impact: Validation order preference, functionality works correctly

minor_observations.issue: Add Note button interaction needs verification in specific scenarios

passed_tests: Leads page loads with property grouping layout
Unassigned Leads section displays correctly with count badge
Property sections are collapsible with chevron icons and lead counts
Lead rows display color-coded strength (red/green), source, dates, contact method, price offered
Add Lead form contains all new fields: Preferred Contact Method, Price Offered, Notes
Lead creation with new fields works successfully
Potential Units section shows available units as clickable badges
No available units scenario shows 'Mark as Unassigned' option
Unassigned lead creation and saving works
Stage progression with Next buttons functional
Stage 8 leads show Convert to Tenant button
All navigation pages work: Properties, Tenants, Income, Vacancy, Calendar, Features
Backend APIs for leads support all new fields correctly
Lead field validation and data persistence working
Property-based lead grouping logic works correctly
